title: Generation-3 evolution audit: process ALL next_audit_inputs (18 items incl. U1-U4 unknowns, P-009 frictions, F-series, active_role NLAH)
description: claude.md 5A audit. Standing human decisions to honor, not re-litigate: (1) U1-U4 (Thariq unknowns pre-phase) are PRE-APPROVED for implementation - convert them into concrete falsifiable task specs, do not debate their worth; (2) the active_role NLAH removal is PRE-APPROVED by the operator (2026-07-05, 'avienta a agentes a hacer los 18 insumos') - spec the minimal CLAUDE.md diff and bundle it with any other NLAH-gated wording fixes into ONE gated task; (3) de-Fable is being applied in T-034 concurrently - do not duplicate it, but verify its inputs are consistent with your proposals. PROPOSE ONLY - never apply.
